name: 03_03_asia_london_range_breakout_xauusd_m5
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the Asia-session (00:00-06:00 UTC) high/low forms an accumulation range; a close beyond the range by >=0.5 ATR with a body >=1.0 ATR during the London window (07:00-10:00 UTC) continues in the breakout direction, yielding positive expectancy.

entry_rules.long: london_session==1 AND close > asia_high + 0.5*ATR(14) AND candle_body >= 1.0*ATR(14) AND (asia_range/ATR(14)) between 0.5 and 2.0 AND bars_since_london_open <= 9
entry_rules.short: london_session==1 AND close < asia_low - 0.5*ATR(14) AND candle_body >= 1.0*ATR(14) AND (asia_range/ATR(14)) between 0.5 and 2.0 AND bars_since_london_open <= 9

exit_rules.stop_loss: opposite side of asia range, capped at 1.5*ATR(14)

notes: Inspired by LVC EA scout card (inspiration_only). Distinct from prior Donchian dead-branch: session-anchored range, not rolling N-bar channel.
